overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a Times Square-style urban canyon at sunset, with Spider-Man perched on a building edge overlooking moderate traffic and illuminated digital billboards. The warm golden hour lighting mixes with vibrant artificial neon displays across the modern glass architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: Times Square style commercial intersection with massive digital billboards

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouched on the building ledge, surveying the street and traffic below

notable_agents.action: Spider-Man perched in a crouched position on the building edge, overlooking the urban canyon

entered.detail: Large vertical digital billboard displaying 'BUMPY SAINTS' advertisement with portrait imagery
Horizontal digital billboard with 'COLGATE' branding in red and white colors
Massive red vertical billboard featuring 'INTENSE & PERSONAL' text and champagne bottle imagery
Tall modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades lining the street canyon into the distance
Multi-lane urban street descending between high-rise buildings with visible crosswalk markings

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view captures Spider-Man crouched on a building edge overlooking a Times Square-style urban canyon at golden hour. Massive illuminated digital billboards dominate the modern glass architecture on both sides, casting colorful light onto the moderate traffic flow below while warm sunset glow fills the sky between the towers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, elevated perspective of a vibrant urban canyon as the warm glow of sunset blends with artificial neon light. It begins with a focused view of Spider-Man crouched on a building edge, overlooking a dense city center reminiscent of Times Square. The camera captures the interplay between the golden hour sky and the massive illuminated digital billboards that dominate the surrounding glass architecture. This colorful light spills downward, bathing the moderate flow of traffic below in a mix of sunset hues and electric brilliance.
